title: SuperFPS
description: One of the best builds for increasing FPS and improving performance
body:

- Update your launcher and [download Java here](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/javase/jdk21-archive-downloads.html).
## **Description**

One of the best optimization builds, which includes more than 25+ mods to improve game performance
